abilities.description: Detain up to two target creatures your opponents control. (Until your next turn, those permanents can't attack or block and their activated abilities can't be activated.)

effect.description: Detain up to two target creatures your opponents control. (Until your next turn, those permanents can't attack or block and their activated abilities can't be activated.)
effect.name: Detain

abilities.target_prompt: Select target creature your opponent controls to detain.
